description_long: This storage box is a cubic container constructed from wooden planks, featuring a pixelated texture reminiscent of block-style video games. The box has a recessed central panel on each visible side, framed by thicker wooden borders, giving it a sturdy and reinforced appearance. The top surface is open or deeply inset, suggesting it is designed to hold or store items securely. Metal corner brackets are visible, adding structural strength and a utilitarian aesthetic. The wood grain pattern is varied, with shades of brown and tan, enhancing the visual depth and realism. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, making it a simple yet robust storage solution suitable for urban environments.
description: A cubic, pixelated wooden storage box with recessed panels and metal corner brackets, featuring a deep inset top and a sturdy, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the recessed central panel framed by thick wooden borders and metal corner brackets.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, with the same recessed panel and border details visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirrors the front and side, maintaining the same panel and bracket features.
description_view_3: Back view is visually consistent with the other sides, showing the same recessed panel and border construction.
